blended.narrative: Sugarloaf is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,048 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
